Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(**************************************************************************************************

  λ-calculus combinators

  There is a lot of `basic' terms that are often used when working with the λ-calculus. This
  file contains definitions for some of these, as well as some lemmas about their interaction with
  substitution and with each other. The file also contains two tactics that assist in proving
  equalities of terms.

  Contents
  1. The tactics [propagate_subst] [generate_refine]
  2. Compose
  3. Pair
  4. Pair arrow
  5. Pair projections [π1] [π2]
  6. Union arrow ('match')
  7. Union injections [ι1] [ι2]
  8. Evaluation of a curried function [ev]
  9. Curry
  10. Uncurry
  11. N-tuple [n_tuple]
  12. N-tuple arrow [n_tuple_arrow]
  13. N-tuple projection [n_π]

 **************************************************************************************************)
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.Combinatorics.Tuples.
Require Import UniMath.Combinatorics.StandardFiniteSets.
Require Import UniMath.Combinatorics.Vectors.

Require Import UniMath.AlgebraicTheories.LambdaTheories.
Require Import UniMath.AlgebraicTheories.AlgebraicTheories.

Local Open Scope vec.
Local Open Scope stn.
Local Open Scope algebraic_theories.
Local Open Scope lambda_calculus.

(** * 1. The tactics *)

Ltac2 Type state := {
  left : string list;
  right : string list;
  side : int;
}.

Ltac2 print_refine (s : state) (t : string) :=
  let (short: bool) := match s.(left), s.(right) with
    | [], [] => true
    | _, _ => false
  end in
  let (beginning, ending) := match (s.(side)), short with
    | 0, true => ("refine '(", " @ _).")
    | 0, false => ("refine '(maponpaths (λ x, ", ") @ _).")
    | _, true => ("refine '(_ @ !", ").")
    | _, false => ("refine '(_ @ !maponpaths (λ x, ", ")).")
  end in
  let navigation := match short with
    | true => []
    | false => [
        String.concat "" (List.rev (s.(left))) ;
        "x" ;
        String.concat "" (s.(right)) ;
        ") ("
      ]
  end in
  Message.print (Message.of_string (String.concat "" [
    beginning ;
    String.concat "" navigation ;
    t ;
    ending
  ])).

Ltac2 mutable traversals () : ((unit -> unit) * string * string) list := [].

Ltac2 rec traverse_left (s : state) (t : state -> unit) () :=
  t s;
  List.iter (
    fun (m, l, r) =>
    try (m () ; Control.focus 2 2 (
      traverse_left {
        s with
        left := (l :: "(" :: s.(left));
        right := (r :: ")" :: s.(right))
      } t
    ))) (List.rev (traversals ()));
  apply idpath.

Ltac2 traverse (t : state -> unit) :=
  refine '(_ @ !_);
  Control.focus 2 2 (traverse_left {
    side := 0;
    left := [];
    right := [];
  } t);
  refine '(_ @ !_);
  Control.focus 2 2 (traverse_left {
    side := 1;
    left := [];
    right := [];
  } t).

Ltac2 generate_refine' (p : pattern) (t : string) := traverse
  (fun s => match! goal with
  | [ |- $pattern:p = _] => print_refine s t
  | [ |- _ = _ ] => ()
  end).

Ltac2 Notation "generate_refine" p(pattern) := generate_refine' p.

Ltac2 mutable rewrites () : ((unit -> unit) * string) list := [].

Ltac2 propagate_subst () := repeat (progress (traverse (fun s =>
  List.iter (fun (r, t) => try (r (); print_refine s t)) (List.rev (rewrites ()))
))).

Ltac2 Set traversals as traversals0 := fun _ => (
    (fun () => match! goal with | [ |- abs _ = _ ] => refine '(maponpaths abs _ @ _) end),
    "abs ",
    ""
  ) :: traversals0 ().

Ltac2 Set traversals as traversals0 := fun _ => (
    (fun () => match! goal with | [ |- app _ _ = _ ] => refine '(maponpaths (λ x, app x _) _ @ _) end),
    "app ",
    " _"
  ) :: traversals0 ().

Ltac2 Set traversals as traversals0 := fun _ => (
    (fun () => match! goal with | [ |- app _ _ = _ ] => refine '(maponpaths (λ x, app _ x) _ @ _) end),
    "app _ ",
    ""
  ) :: traversals0 ().

Ltac2 Set traversals as traversals0 := fun _ => (
    (fun () => match! goal with | [ |- _ • _ = _ ] => refine '(maponpaths (λ x, x • _) _ @ _) end),
    "",
    " • _"
  ) :: traversals0 ().

Ltac2 Set traversals as traversals0 := fun _ => (
    (fun () => match! goal with | [ |- inflate _ = _ ] => refine '(maponpaths inflate _ @ _) end),
    "inflate ",
    ""
  ) :: traversals0 ().

Ltac2 Set rewrites as rewrites0 := fun () =>
  ((fun () => match! goal with
  | [ |- (var ?a) • ?b = _] => refine '(var_subst _ $a $b)
  end), "var_subst _ _ _") :: rewrites0 ().

Ltac2 Set rewrites as rewrites0 := fun () =>
  ((fun () => match! goal with
  | [ |- (abs ?a) • ?b = _] => refine '(subst_abs _ $a $b)
  end), "subst_abs _ _ _") :: rewrites0 ().

Ltac2 Set rewrites as rewrites0 := fun () =>
  ((fun () => match! goal with
  | [ |- (app ?a ?b) • ?c = _] => refine '(subst_app _ $a $b $c)
  end), "subst_app _ _ _ _") :: rewrites0 ().

Ltac2 Set rewrites as rewrites0 := fun () =>
  ((fun () => match! goal with
  | [ |- (?a • ?b) • ?c = _] => refine '(subst_subst _ $a $b $c)
  end), "subst_subst _ _ _ _") :: rewrites0 ().

Ltac2 Set rewrites as rewrites0 := fun () =>
  ((fun () => match! goal with
  | [ |- app (abs ?a) ?b = _] => refine '(beta_equality _ _ $a $b); assumption
  end), "beta_equality _ Lβ _ _") :: rewrites0 ().

Ltac2 Set rewrites as rewrites0 := fun () =>
  ((fun () => match! goal with
  | [ |- inflate ?a • ?b = _] => refine '(subst_inflate _ $a $b)
  end), "subst_inflate _ _ _") :: rewrites0 ().

Ltac2 Set rewrites as rewrites0 := fun () =>
  ((fun () => match! goal with
  | [ |- inflate (var ?a) = _] => refine '(inflate_var _ $a)
  end), "inflate_var _ _") :: rewrites0 ().

Ltac2 Set rewrites as rewrites0 := fun () =>
  ((fun () => match! goal with
  | [ |- inflate (abs ?a) = _] => refine '(inflate_abs _ $a)
  end), "inflate_abs _ _") :: rewrites0 ().

Ltac2 Set rewrites as rewrites0 := fun () =>
  ((fun () => match! goal with
  | [ |- inflate (app ?a ?b) = _] => refine '(inflate_app _ $a $b)
  end), "inflate_app _ _ _") :: rewrites0 ().

Ltac2 Set rewrites as rewrites0 := fun () =>
  ((fun () => match! goal with
  | [ |- inflate (?a • ?b) = _] => refine '(inflate_subst _ $a $b)
  end), "inflate_subst _ _ _") :: rewrites0 ().

Ltac2 Set rewrites as rewrites0 := fun () =>
  ((fun () => match! goal with
  | [ |- extend_tuple ?a ?b (_ (inl ?c)) = _] => refine '(extend_tuple_inl $a $b $c)
  end), "extend_tuple_inl _ _ _") :: rewrites0 ().

Ltac2 Set rewrites as rewrites0 := fun () =>
  ((fun () => match! goal with
  | [ |- extend_tuple ?a ?b (_ (inr ?c)) = _] => refine '(extend_tuple_inr $a $b $c)
  end), "extend_tuple_inr _ _ _") :: rewrites0 ().

(** * 2. Compose *)

Definition compose
  {L : lambda_theory}
  {n : nat}
  (a b : L n)
  : L n
  := abs
    (app
      (inflate a)
      (app
        (inflate b)
        (var (stnweq (inr tt))))).


Setting b constr at next level
to match previous notation with longest common prefix:
"_ ∘ _".


Ltac2 Set traversals as traversals0 := fun _ => (
    (fun () => match! goal with | [ |- _ ∘ _ = _ ] => refine '(maponpaths (λ x, x ∘ _) _ @ _) end),
    "",
    " ∘ _"
  ) :: traversals0 ().

Ltac2 Set traversals as traversals0 := fun _ => (
    (fun () => match! goal with | [ |- _ ∘ _ = _ ] => refine '(maponpaths (λ x, _ ∘ x) _ @ _) end),
    "_ ∘ ",
    ""
  ) :: traversals0 ().

m, n: ℕ
a, b: L m
c: ⟦ m ⟧ → L n
(a ∘ b) • c = a • c ∘ b • c

a, b: L m
c: ⟦ m ⟧ → L n
(a ∘ b) • c = a • c ∘ b • c

• extend_tuple (λ i : ⟦ m ⟧, inflate (c i))
    (var (stnweq (inr tt)))) = a • c ∘ b • c

(inflate (b • c) var (stnweq (inr tt)))))

  
L: lambda_theory
m, n: ℕ
a, b: L m
c: ⟦ m ⟧ → L n

(λ'n,

(b • (λ i : ⟦ m ⟧, inflate (c i))
var (stnweq (inr tt)))))

  refine '(
    maponpaths (λ x, abs (app (a • x) _)) _ @
    maponpaths (λ x, abs (app _ (app (b • x) _))) _
  );
    apply funextfun;
    intro i;
    exact (extend_tuple_inl _ _ _).
Qed.

Ltac2 Set rewrites as rewrites0 := fun () =>
  ((fun () => match! goal with
  | [ |- (?a ∘ ?b) • ?c = _] => refine '(subst_compose _ $a $b $c)
  end), "subst_compose _ _ _ _") :: rewrites0 ().

Definition inflate_compose
  (L : lambda_theory)
  {n : nat}
  (a b : L n)
  : inflate (a ∘ b) = inflate a ∘ inflate b
  := subst_compose L _ _ _.

Ltac2 Set rewrites as rewrites0 := fun () =>
  ((fun () => match! goal with
  | [ |- inflate (?a ∘ ?b) = _] => refine '(inflate_compose _ $a $b)
  end), "inflate_compose _ _ _") :: rewrites0 ().

a, b, c: L n
(a ∘ b c) = (a (b c))

    exact (!maponpaths (λ x, (app (_ ∘ x) _)) (var_subst _ _ _)).

  extend_tuple var (var (stnpr 2)) (stnweq (inl i)))
   (stnpr 1)
extend_tuple var (var (stnpr 2)) (stnweq (inr tt)))) =
(var (stnpr 0) (var (stnpr 1) var (stnpr 2)))

    
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
a, b, c: L n
(var (stnpr 0)
(extend_tuple var (var (stnpr 2))
   (stnweq (inl (stnpr 1))) var (stnpr 2))) =
(var (stnpr 0) (var (stnpr 1) var (stnpr 2)))

    exact (maponpaths (λ x, (app _ (app x _))) (extend_tuple_inl _ _ _)).
  
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
a, b, c: L n
(var (● 0 : ⟦ 3 ⟧)
(var (● 1 : ⟦ 3 ⟧) var (● 2 : ⟦ 3 ⟧)))
• weqvecfun 3 [(a; b; c)] = (a (b c))
 
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
a, b, c: L n
(var (● 0) • weqvecfun 3 [(a; b; c)]
(var (● 1 : ⟦ 3 ⟧) var (● 2 : ⟦ 3 ⟧))
• weqvecfun 3 [(a; b; c)]) = (a (b c))

    
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
a, b, c: L n
(weqvecfun 3 [(a; b; c)] (● 0)
(var (● 1 : ⟦ 3 ⟧) var (● 2 : ⟦ 3 ⟧))
• weqvecfun 3 [(a; b; c)]) = (a (b c))

    
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
a, b, c: L n
(weqvecfun 3 [(a; b; c)] (● 0)
(var (● 1 : ⟦ 3 ⟧) • weqvecfun 3 [(a; b; c)]
var (● 2 : ⟦ 3 ⟧) • weqvecfun 3 [(a; b; c)])) =
(a (b c))

    
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
a, b, c: L n
(weqvecfun 3 [(a; b; c)] (● 0)
(weqvecfun 3 [(a; b; c)] (● 1)
var (● 2 : ⟦ 3 ⟧) • weqvecfun 3 [(a; b; c)])) =
(a (b c))

    exact (maponpaths (λ x, (app _ (app _ x))) (var_subst _ _ _)).
Qed.

f:= weqvecfun 3 [(a; b; c)]: ⟦ 3 ⟧ → L n
a ∘ (b ∘ c) = a ∘ b ∘ c

(var (● 0 : ⟦ 3 ⟧)
 ∘ (var (● 1 : ⟦ 3 ⟧) ∘ var (● 2 : ⟦ 3 ⟧))) • f

 ∘ var (● 2 : ⟦ 3 ⟧)) • f

(var (stnweq (inl (stnpr 1)))
(var (stnweq (inl (stnpr 2))) var (stnweq (inr tt)))))) =
(λ'3,
(extend_tuple
   (λ i : ⟦ 3 ⟧, var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inl i)))))
   (var (stnweq (inr tt))) (stnweq (inl (stnpr 0)))

     (var (stnweq (inl (stnpr 2)))
     var (stnweq (inr tt)))
(var (stnpr 1)

       (λ i0 : ⟦ 3 ⟧,
        var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inl i0)))))
       (var (stnweq (inr tt))) t_l
     • extend_tuple var
         (var (stnweq (inl (stnpr 2)))
         var (stnweq (inr tt)))) (stnweq (inl i)))

    exact (!maponpaths (λ x, (abs (app _ (app x _)))) (extend_tuple_inl _ _ _)).
  
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
a, b, c: L n
f:= weqvecfun 3 [(a; b; c)]: ⟦ 3 ⟧ → L n
(var (● 0 : ⟦ 3 ⟧) ∘ var (● 1 : ⟦ 3 ⟧)
 ∘ var (● 2 : ⟦ 3 ⟧)) • f = a ∘ b ∘ c
 
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
a, b, c: L n
f:= weqvecfun 3 [(a; b; c)]: ⟦ 3 ⟧ → L n
(var (● 0 : ⟦ 3 ⟧) ∘ var (● 1 : ⟦ 3 ⟧)) • f
∘ var (● 2 : ⟦ 3 ⟧) • f = a ∘ b ∘ c

    
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
a, b, c: L n
f:= weqvecfun 3 [(a; b; c)]: ⟦ 3 ⟧ → L n
var (● 0 : ⟦ 3 ⟧) • f ∘ var (● 1 : ⟦ 3 ⟧) • f
∘ var (● 2 : ⟦ 3 ⟧) • f = a ∘ b ∘ c

    
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
a, b, c: L n
f:= weqvecfun 3 [(a; b; c)]: ⟦ 3 ⟧ → L n
var (● 0 : ⟦ 3 ⟧) • f ∘ var (● 1 : ⟦ 3 ⟧) • f
∘ f (● 2) = a ∘ b ∘ c

    
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
a, b, c: L n
f:= weqvecfun 3 [(a; b; c)]: ⟦ 3 ⟧ → L n
f (● 0) ∘ var (● 1 : ⟦ 3 ⟧) • f ∘ f (● 2) = a ∘ b ∘ c

    exact (maponpaths (λ x, ((_ ∘ x) ∘ _)) (var_subst _ _ _)).
Qed.


L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A, B: L 0
appx A • (λ _ : ⟦ 1 ⟧, appx B) = appx (A ∘ B)

A, B: L 0
appx A • (λ _ : ⟦ 1 ⟧, appx B) = appx (A ∘ B)

(inflate A var (stnweq (inr tt)))

i: ⟦ 0 ⟧
var (stnweq (inl i)) =
(inflate B var (stnweq (inr tt)))

  
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A, B: L 0
i: ⟦ 0 ⟧
∅

  apply (negstn0 i).
Qed.


L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A, B: L 1
(λ'0, A) ∘ (λ'0, B) = (λ'0, A • (λ _ : ⟦ 1 ⟧, B))


L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A, B: L 1
(λ'0, A) ∘ (λ'0, B) = (λ'0, A • (λ _ : ⟦ 1 ⟧, B))

  
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A, B: L 1
(λ'0, A) ∘ (λ'0, B) =
(λ'0,
(pr12 (LambdaTheoryCategoryCore.theory_data L)) 0
  ((λ (L : Categories.ob
             (Categories.precategory_ob_mor_from_precategory_data
                (Categories.precategory_data_from_precategory
                   (Categories.category_to_precategory
                      LambdaTheoryCategoryCore.lambda_theory_data_cat))))
    (n : ℕ)
    (f : (λ L0 : Categories.ob
                   (Categories.precategory_ob_mor_from_precategory_data
                      (Categories.precategory_data_from_precategory
                         (Categories.category_to_precategory
                            LambdaTheoryCategoryCore.lambda_theory_data_cat))),
          pr1 L0) L (S n)), (pr22 L) n f)
     (LambdaTheoryCategoryCore.theory_data L) 0 A)
• (λ _ : ⟦ 1 ⟧, B))

  
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A, B: L 1
(λ'0, A) ∘ (λ'0, B) =
(λ'0,
(pr12 (LambdaTheoryCategoryCore.theory_data L)) 0
  ((λ (L : Categories.ob
             (Categories.precategory_ob_mor_from_precategory_data
                (Categories.precategory_data_from_precategory
                   (Categories.category_to_precategory
                      LambdaTheoryCategoryCore.lambda_theory_data_cat))))
    (n : ℕ)
    (f : (λ L0 : Categories.ob
                   (Categories.precategory_ob_mor_from_precategory_data
                      (Categories.precategory_data_from_precategory
                         (Categories.category_to_precategory
                            LambdaTheoryCategoryCore.lambda_theory_data_cat))),
          pr1 L0) L (S n)), (pr22 L) n f)
     (LambdaTheoryCategoryCore.theory_data L) 0 A)
• (λ _ : ⟦ 1 ⟧,
   (pr12 (LambdaTheoryCategoryCore.theory_data L)) 0
     ((λ (L : Categories.ob
                (Categories.precategory_ob_mor_from_precategory_data
                   (Categories.precategory_data_from_precategory
                      (Categories.category_to_precategory
                         LambdaTheoryCategoryCore.lambda_theory_data_cat))))
       (n : ℕ)
       (f : (λ L0 : Categories.ob
                      (Categories.precategory_ob_mor_from_precategory_data
                         (Categories.precategory_data_from_precategory
                            (Categories.category_to_precategory
                               LambdaTheoryCategoryCore.lambda_theory_data_cat))),
             pr1 L0) L (S n)), (pr22 L) n f)
        (LambdaTheoryCategoryCore.theory_data L) 0 B)))

  
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
A, B: L 1
(λ'0, A) ∘ (λ'0, B) =
(λ'0,
appx
  ((pr22 (LambdaTheoryCategoryCore.theory_data L)) 0 A
   ∘ (pr22 (LambdaTheoryCategoryCore.theory_data L)) 0
       B))

  exact (maponpaths _ (!Lβ _ _)).
Qed.

(** * 3. Pair *)

Definition pair
  {L : lambda_theory}
  {n : nat}
  (a b : L n)
  : L n
  := abs
    (app
      (app
        (var (stnweq (inr tt)))
        (inflate a))
      (inflate b)).

Notation "⟨ a , b ⟩" :=
  (pair a b)
  : lambda_calculus.

Ltac2 Set traversals as traversals0 := fun _ => (
    (fun () => match! goal with | [ |- ⟨_, _⟩ = _ ] => refine '(maponpaths (λ x, ⟨x, _⟩) _ @ _) end),
    "⟨",
    ", _⟩"
  ) :: traversals0 ().

Ltac2 Set traversals as traversals0 := fun _ => (
    (fun () => match! goal with | [ |- ⟨_, _⟩ = _ ] => refine '(maponpaths (λ x, ⟨_, x⟩) _ @ _) end),
    "⟨_, ",
    "⟩"
  ) :: traversals0 ().


L: lambda_theory
m, n: ℕ
a, b: L m
c: ⟦ m ⟧ → L n
⟨ a, b ⟩ • c = ⟨ a • c, b • c ⟩


L: lambda_theory
m, n: ℕ
a, b: L m
c: ⟦ m ⟧ → L n
⟨ a, b ⟩ • c = ⟨ a • c, b • c ⟩

  
L: lambda_theory
m, n: ℕ
a, b: L m
c: ⟦ m ⟧ → L n
(λ'n,
((var (stnweq (inr tt)) inflate a) inflate b)
• extend_tuple (λ i : ⟦ m ⟧, inflate (c i))
    (var (stnweq (inr tt)))) = ⟨ a • c, b • c ⟩

  
L: lambda_theory
m, n: ℕ
a, b: L m
c: ⟦ m ⟧ → L n
(λ'n,
((var (stnweq (inr tt)) inflate a)
 • extend_tuple (λ i : ⟦ m ⟧, inflate (c i))
     (var (stnweq (inr tt)))
inflate b
• extend_tuple (λ i : ⟦ m ⟧, inflate (c i))
    (var (stnweq (inr tt))))) = ⟨ a • c, b • c ⟩

  
L: lambda_theory
m, n: ℕ
a, b: L m
c: ⟦ m ⟧ → L n
(λ'n,
((var (stnweq (inr tt))

     (var (stnweq (inr tt))))
inflate b

    (var (stnweq (inr tt))))) = ⟨ a • c, b • c ⟩

    maponpaths (λ x, abs (app (app _ (a • x)) _)) _ @
    maponpaths (λ x, abs (app _ (b • x))) _
  );
    apply funextfun;
    intro i;
    exact (extend_tuple_inl _ _ _).
Qed.

Ltac2 Set rewrites as rewrites0 := fun () =>
  ((fun () => match! goal with
  | [ |- (⟨?a , ?b⟩) • ?c = _] => refine '(subst_pair _ $a $b $c)
  end), "subst_pair _ _ _ _") :: rewrites0 ().

Definition inflate_pair
  (L : lambda_theory)
  {n : nat}
  (a b : L n)
  : inflate (⟨a, b⟩) = ⟨inflate a, inflate b⟩
  := subst_pair _ _ _ _.

Ltac2 Set rewrites as rewrites0 := fun () =>
  ((fun () => match! goal with
  | [ |- inflate (⟨?a , ?b⟩) = _] => refine '(inflate_pair _ $a $b)
  end), "inflate_pair _ _ _") :: rewrites0 ().

(** * 4. Pair arrow *)

Definition pair_arrow
  {L : lambda_theory}
  {n : nat}
  (a b : L n)
  : L n
  := abs
    (pair
      (app
        (inflate a)
        (var (stnweq (inr tt))))
      (app
        (inflate b)
        (var (stnweq (inr tt))))).

Ltac2 Set traversals as traversals0 := fun _ => (
    (fun () => match! goal with | [ |- pair_arrow _ _ = _ ] => refine '(maponpaths (λ x, pair_arrow x _) _ @ _) end),
    "pair_arrow ",
    " _"
  ) :: traversals0 ().

Ltac2 Set traversals as traversals0 := fun _ => (
    (fun () => match! goal with | [ |- pair_arrow _ _ = _ ] => refine '(maponpaths (λ x, pair_arrow _ x) _ @ _) end),
    "pair_arrow _ ",
    ""
  ) :: traversals0 ().

m, n: ℕ
a, b: L m
c: ⟦ m ⟧ → L n
pair_arrow a b • c = pair_arrow (a • c) (b • c)

Ltac2 Set rewrites as rewrites0 := fun () =>
  ((fun () => match! goal with
  | [ |- (pair_arrow ?a ?b) • ?c = _] => refine '(subst_pair_arrow _ $a $b $c)
  end), "subst_pair_arrow _ _ _ _") :: rewrites0 ().

Definition inflate_pair_arrow
  (L : lambda_theory)
  {n : nat}
  (a b : L n)
  : inflate (pair_arrow a b) = pair_arrow (inflate a) (inflate b)
  := subst_pair_arrow _ _ _ _.

Ltac2 Set rewrites as rewrites0 := fun () =>
  ((fun () => match! goal with
  | [ |- inflate (pair_arrow ?a ?b) = _] => refine '(inflate_pair_arrow _ $a $b)
  end), "inflate_pair_arrow _ _ _") :: rewrites0 ().

Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
a, b, c: L n
(pair_arrow a b c) = ⟨ (a c), (b c) ⟩

(pair_arrow a b c) = ⟨ (a c), (b c) ⟩

a, b, c: L n
⟨ (inflate a var (stnweq (inr tt))),
(inflate b var (stnweq (inr tt))) ⟩

⟩ = ⟨ (a c), (b c) ⟩

(λ'n,

   • (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧,

(inflate b (inflate c var (stnweq (inr tt)))) ⟩)

  refine '(maponpaths (λ x, abs (⟨ app (_ • x) _ , _ ⟩)) _ @ maponpaths (λ x, abs (⟨ _ , app (_ • x) _ ⟩)) _);
    apply funextfun;
    intro i;
    exact (extend_tuple_inl _ _ _).
Qed.

(** * 5. Pair projections *)

Definition π1
  {L : lambda_theory}
  {n : nat}
  : L n
  := abs
    (app
      (var (stnweq (inr tt)))
      (abs
        (abs
          (var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inr tt)))))))).


L: lambda_theory
m, n: ℕ
t: ⟦ m ⟧ → L n
π1 • t = π1


L: lambda_theory
m, n: ℕ
t: ⟦ m ⟧ → L n
π1 • t = π1

  
L: lambda_theory
m, n: ℕ
t: ⟦ m ⟧ → L n
(λ'n,
(var (stnweq (inr tt))
(λ'1 + m,
(λ'1 + (1 + m), var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inr tt)))))))
• extend_tuple (λ i : ⟦ m ⟧, inflate (t i))
    (var (stnweq (inr tt)))) = π1

     (var (stnweq (inr tt)))

    (λ i : ⟦ S m ⟧,
     inflate
       (extend_tuple (λ i0 : ⟦ m ⟧, inflate (t i0))
          (var (stnweq (inr tt))) i))
    (var (stnweq (inr tt)))))) = π1

(var (stnweq (inr tt))

     inflate

    (var (stnweq (inr tt)))))) = π1

(λ'n,
(var (stnweq (inr tt))
(λ'S n,

var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inr tt))))
• extend_tuple
    (λ i : ⟦ S (S m) ⟧,
     inflate
       (extend_tuple
          (λ i0 : ⟦ S m ⟧,
           inflate
             (extend_tuple
                (λ i1 : ⟦ m ⟧, inflate (t i1))
                (var (stnweq (inr tt))) i0))
          (var (stnweq (inr tt))) i))
    (var (stnweq (inr tt))))))) = π1

  
L: lambda_theory
m, n: ℕ
t: ⟦ m ⟧ → L n
(λ'n,
(var (stnweq (inr tt))
(λ'S n,
(λ'S (S n),
extend_tuple
  (λ i : ⟦ S (S m) ⟧,
   inflate
     (extend_tuple
        (λ i0 : ⟦ S m ⟧,
         inflate
           (extend_tuple
              (λ i1 : ⟦ m ⟧, inflate (t i1))
              (var (stnweq (inr tt))) i0))
        (var (stnweq (inr tt))) i))
  (var (stnweq (inr tt)))
  (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inr tt)))))))) = π1

  
L: lambda_theory
m, n: ℕ
t: ⟦ m ⟧ → L n
(λ'n,
(var (stnweq (inr tt))
(λ'S n,
(λ'S (S n),
(λ i : ⟦ S (S m) ⟧,
 inflate
   (extend_tuple
      (λ i0 : ⟦ S m ⟧,
       inflate
         (extend_tuple (λ i1 : ⟦ m ⟧, inflate (t i1))
            (var (stnweq (inr tt))) i0))
      (var (stnweq (inr tt))) i)) (stnweq (inr tt)))))) =
π1

  
L: lambda_theory
m, n: ℕ
t: ⟦ m ⟧ → L n
(λ'n,
(var (stnweq (inr tt))
(λ'S n, (λ'S (S n), inflate (var (stnweq (inr tt))))))) =
π1

  exact (maponpaths (λ x, (abs (app _ (abs (abs x))))) (inflate_var _ _)).
Qed.

Ltac2 Set rewrites as rewrites0 := fun () =>
  ((fun () => match! goal with
  | [ |- π1 • ?a = _] => refine '(subst_π1 _ $a)
  end), "subst_π1 _ _") :: rewrites0 ().

Definition inflate_π1
  (L : lambda_theory)
  {n : nat}
  : inflate (π1 : L n) = π1
  := subst_π1 _ _.

Ltac2 Set rewrites as rewrites0 := fun () =>
  ((fun () => match! goal with
  | [ |- inflate π1 = _] => refine '(inflate_π1 _)
  end), "inflate_π1 _") :: rewrites0 ().

a, b: L n
(π1 ⟨ a, b ⟩) = a

Ltac2 Set rewrites as rewrites0 := fun () =>
  ((fun () => match! goal with
  | [ |- app π1 (⟨?a , ?b⟩) = _] => refine '(π1_pair _ _ $a $b); assumption
  end), "π1_pair _ Lβ _ _") :: rewrites0 ().

a, b: L n

(λ'n, (inflate a var (stnweq (inr tt))))

Unused variable: a.
[ltac2-unused-variable,ltac2,default]


Definition π2
  {L : lambda_theory}
  {n : nat}
  : L n
  := abs
    (app
      (var (stnweq (inr tt)))
      (abs
        (abs
          (var (stnweq (inr tt)))))).


L: lambda_theory
m, n: ℕ
t: ⟦ m ⟧ → L n
π2 • t = π2

t: ⟦ m ⟧ → L n

(var (stnweq (inr tt))
(λ'1 + m, (λ'S (1 + m), var (stnweq (inr tt)))))

    (var (stnweq (inr tt)))) = π2

L: lambda_theory
m, n: ℕ
t: ⟦ m ⟧ → L n
(λ'n,
(var (stnweq (inr tt))
(λ'S n,
(λ'S (S n),
extend_tuple
  (λ i : ⟦ S (S m) ⟧,
   inflate
     (extend_tuple
        (λ i0 : ⟦ S m ⟧,
         inflate
           (extend_tuple
              (λ i1 : ⟦ m ⟧, inflate (t i1))
              (var (stnweq (inr tt))) i0))
        (var (stnweq (inr tt))) i))
  (var (stnweq (inr tt))) (stnweq (inr tt)))))) = π2

  exact (maponpaths (λ x, (abs (app _ (abs (abs x))))) (extend_tuple_inr _ _ _)).
Qed.

Ltac2 Set rewrites as rewrites0 := fun () =>
  ((fun () => match! goal with
  | [ |- π2 • ?c = _] => refine '(subst_π2 _ $c)
  end), "subst_π2 _ _") :: rewrites0 ().

Definition inflate_π2
  (L : lambda_theory)
  {n : nat}
  : inflate (π2 : L n) = π2
  := subst_π2 _ _.

Ltac2 Set rewrites as rewrites0 := fun () =>
  ((fun () => match! goal with
  | [ |- inflate π2 = _] => refine '(inflate_π2 _)
  end), "inflate_π2 _") :: rewrites0 ().

Unused variable: b.

(** * 6. Union arrow ('match') *)

Definition union_arrow
  {L : lambda_theory}
  {n : nat}
  (a b : L n)
  : L n
  := abs
    (app
      (app
        (var (stnweq (inr tt)))
        (inflate a))
      (inflate b)).

Ltac2 Set traversals as traversals0 := fun _ => (
    (fun () => match! goal with | [ |- union_arrow _ _ = _ ] => refine '(maponpaths (λ x, union_arrow x _) _ @ _) end),
    "union_arrow ",
    " _"
  ) :: traversals0 ().

Ltac2 Set traversals as traversals0 := fun _ => (
    (fun () => match! goal with | [ |- union_arrow _ _ = _ ] => refine '(maponpaths (λ x, union_arrow _ x) _ @ _) end),
    "union_arrow _ ",
    ""
  ) :: traversals0 ().

n, m: ℕ
a, b: L n
c: ⟦ n ⟧ → L m
union_arrow a b • c = union_arrow (a • c) (b • c)

union_arrow a b • c = union_arrow (a • c) (b • c)

Ltac2 Set rewrites as rewrites0 := fun () =>
  ((fun () => match! goal with
  | [ |- union_arrow ?a ?b • ?c = _] => refine '(subst_union_arrow _ $a $b $c)
  end), "subst_union_arrow _ _ _ _") :: rewrites0 ().

Definition inflate_union_arrow
  (L : lambda_theory)
  {n : nat}
  (a b : L n)
  : inflate (union_arrow a b) = union_arrow (inflate a) (inflate b)
  := subst_union_arrow _ _ _ _.

Ltac2 Set rewrites as rewrites0 := fun () =>
  ((fun () => match! goal with
  | [ |- inflate (union_arrow ?a ?b) = _] => refine '(inflate_union_arrow _ $a $b)
  end), "inflate_union_arrow _ _ _") :: rewrites0 ().

(union_arrow a b c) = ((c a) b)

(** * 7. Union injections *)

Definition ι1
  {L : lambda_theory}
  {n : nat}
  : L n
  := abs (abs (abs
    (app
      (var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inr tt)))))
      (var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inr tt))))))))
      )).


L: lambda_theory
n, m: ℕ
a: ⟦ n ⟧ → L m
ι1 • a = ι1


L: lambda_theory
n, m: ℕ
a: ⟦ n ⟧ → L m
ι1 • a = ι1

(λ'm,
(λ'1 + n,
(λ'1 + (1 + n),
(var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inr tt))))
var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inr tt)))))))))
• extend_tuple (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, inflate (a i))
    (var (stnweq (inr tt)))) = ι1

                (λ i1 : ⟦ n ⟧, inflate (a i1))
                (var (stnweq (inr tt))) i0))
          (var (stnweq (inr tt))) i))
    (var (stnweq (inr tt))))))) = ι1

  exact (maponpaths (λ x, (abs (abs (abs (app _ x))))) (inflate_var _ _)).
Qed.

Ltac2 Set rewrites as rewrites0 := fun () =>
  ((fun () => match! goal with
  | [ |- ι1 • ?a = _] => refine '(subst_ι1 _ $a)
  end), "subst_ι1 _ _") :: rewrites0 ().

Definition inflate_ι1
  (L : lambda_theory)
  {n : nat}
  : inflate (ι1 : L n) = ι1
  := subst_ι1 _ _.

Ltac2 Set rewrites as rewrites0 := fun () =>
  ((fun () => match! goal with
  | [ |- inflate ι1 = _] => refine '(inflate_ι1 _)
  end), "inflate_ι1 _") :: rewrites0 ().

a, b, c: L n
(((ι1 a) b) c) = (b a)

var i

Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
a, b, c: L n
i: ⟦ n ⟧
var i
• (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, extend_tuple var c (stnweq (inl i))) =
var i

    
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
a, b, c: L n
i: ⟦ n ⟧
(λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, extend_tuple var c (stnweq (inl i))) i =
var i

    exact (extend_tuple_inl _ _ _).
Qed.

Definition ι2
  {L : lambda_theory}
  {n : nat}
  : L n
  := abs (abs (abs
    (app
      (var (stnweq (inr tt)))
      (var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inr tt))))))))
      )).

L: lambda_theory
n, m: ℕ
a: ⟦ n ⟧ → L m

  exact (maponpaths (λ x, (abs (abs (abs (app _ x))))) (inflate_var _ _)).
Qed.

Ltac2 Set rewrites as rewrites0 := fun () =>
  ((fun () => match! goal with
  | [ |- ι2 • ?a = _] => refine '(subst_ι2 _ $a)
  end), "subst_ι2 _ _") :: rewrites0 ().

Definition inflate_ι2
  (L : lambda_theory)
  {n : nat}
  : inflate (ι2 : L n) = ι2
  := subst_ι2 _ _.

Ltac2 Set rewrites as rewrites0 := fun () =>
  ((fun () => match! goal with
  | [ |- inflate ι2 = _] => refine '(inflate_ι2 _)
  end), "inflate_ι2 _") :: rewrites0 ().

(extend_tuple
   (λ i : ⟦ S (S n) ⟧,
    inflate
      ((λ t_l : ⟦ S (S n) ⟧,
        extend_tuple
          (λ i0 : ⟦ S n ⟧,
           inflate (extend_tuple var a i0))
          (var (stnweq (inr tt))) t_l
        • extend_tuple var b) i))
   (var (stnweq (inr tt))) (stnweq (inr tt))
 • extend_tuple var c
(λ t_l : ⟦ S (S (S n)) ⟧,
 extend_tuple
   (λ i : ⟦ S (S n) ⟧,
    inflate
      ((λ t_l0 : ⟦ S (S n) ⟧,
        extend_tuple
          (λ i0 : ⟦ S n ⟧,
           inflate (extend_tuple var a i0))
          (var (stnweq (inr tt))) t_l0
        • extend_tuple var b) i))
   (var (stnweq (inr tt))) t_l • extend_tuple var c)
  (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inr tt))))))) =
(c a)

(** * 8. Evaluation of a curried function *)

Definition ev
  {L : lambda_theory}
  {m : nat}
  (a b : L m)
  : L m
  := abs
    (app
      (inflate a)
      (app
        (app
          π1
          (var (stnweq (inr tt))))
        (app
          (inflate b)
          (app
            π2
            (var (stnweq (inr tt))))))).

Ltac2 Set traversals as traversals0 := fun _ => (
    (fun () => match! goal with | [ |- ev _ _ = _ ] => refine '(maponpaths (λ x, ev x _) _ @ _) end),
    "ev ",
    " _"
  ) :: traversals0 ().

Ltac2 Set traversals as traversals0 := fun _ => (
    (fun () => match! goal with | [ |- ev _ _ = _ ] => refine '(maponpaths (λ x, ev _ x) _ @ _) end),
    "ev _ ",
    ""
  ) :: traversals0 ().


L: lambda_theory
m, m': ℕ
a, b: L m
c: ⟦ m ⟧ → L m'
ev a b • c = ev (a • c) (b • c)


L: lambda_theory
m, m': ℕ
a, b: L m
c: ⟦ m ⟧ → L m'
ev a b • c = ev (a • c) (b • c)

(inflate a
((π1 var (stnweq (inr tt)))
(inflate b (π2 var (stnweq (inr tt))))))

    (var (stnweq (inr tt)))) = ev (a • c) (b • c)

Qed.

Ltac2 Set rewrites as rewrites0 := fun () =>
  ((fun () => match! goal with
  | [ |- (ev ?a ?b) • ?c = _] => refine '(subst_ev _ $a $b $c)
  end), "subst_ev _ _ _ _") :: rewrites0 ().

Definition inflate_ev
  (L : lambda_theory)
  {n : nat}
  (a b : L n)
  : inflate (ev a b) = ev (inflate a) (inflate b)
  := subst_ev _ _ _ _.

Ltac2 Set rewrites as rewrites0 := fun () =>
  ((fun () => match! goal with
  | [ |- inflate (ev ?a ?b) = _] => refine '(inflate_ev _ $a $b)
  end), "inflate_ev _ _ _") :: rewrites0 ().

  exact (maponpaths (λ x, (abs x)) (app_ev_pair _ Lβ _ _ _ _)).
Qed.

(** * 9. Curry *)

Definition curry
  {L : lambda_theory}
  {m : nat}
  (a : L m)
  : L m
  := abs
    (abs
      (app
        (inflate (inflate a))
        (⟨
          var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inr tt)))),
          var (stnweq (inr tt))
        ⟩))).

Ltac2 Set traversals as traversals0 := fun _ => (
    (fun () => match! goal with | [ |- curry _ = _ ] => refine '(maponpaths (λ x, curry x) _ @ _) end),
    "curry ",
    ""
  ) :: traversals0 ().

m, m': ℕ
a: L m
b: ⟦ m ⟧ → L m'
curry a • b = curry (a • b)

b: ⟦ m ⟧ → L m'
curry a • b = curry (a • b)

var (stnweq (inr tt)) ⟩))
• extend_tuple (λ i : ⟦ m ⟧, inflate (b i))
    (var (stnweq (inr tt)))) = curry (a • b)

    (λ i0 : ⟦ S m ⟧,
     extend_tuple
       (λ i1 : ⟦ S m ⟧,
        inflate
          (extend_tuple (λ i2 : ⟦ m ⟧, inflate (b i2))
             (var (stnweq (inr tt))) i1))
       (var (stnweq (inr tt))) (stnweq (inl i0)))
      (stnweq (inl i)))
⟨ extend_tuple
    (λ i : ⟦ S m ⟧,
     inflate
       (extend_tuple (λ i0 : ⟦ m ⟧, inflate (b i0))
          (var (stnweq (inr tt))) i))
    (var (stnweq (inr tt)))
    (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inr tt)))),
var (stnweq (inr tt))
• extend_tuple
    (λ i : ⟦ S m ⟧,
     inflate
       (extend_tuple (λ i0 : ⟦ m ⟧, inflate (b i0))
          (var (stnweq (inr tt))) i))
    (var (stnweq (inr tt))) ⟩))) = curry (a • b)

⟨ var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inr tt)))),
var (stnweq (inr tt)) ⟩))) = curry (a • b)

  
L: lambda_theory
m, m': ℕ
a: L m
b: ⟦ m ⟧ → L m'
(λ'm',
(λ'S m',
(a
 • (λ i : ⟦ m ⟧,
    (λ i0 : ⟦ S m ⟧,
     extend_tuple
       (λ i1 : ⟦ S m ⟧,
        inflate
          (extend_tuple (λ i2 : ⟦ m ⟧, inflate (b i2))
             (var (stnweq (inr tt))) i1))
       (var (stnweq (inr tt))) (stnweq (inl i0)))
      (stnweq (inl i)))
⟨ var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inr tt)))),
var (stnweq (inr tt)) ⟩))) =

(λ'S m',

⟨ var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inr tt)))),

L: lambda_theory
m, m': ℕ
a: L m
b: ⟦ m ⟧ → L m'
(λ'm',
(λ'S m',
(a
 • (λ i : ⟦ m ⟧,
    (λ i0 : ⟦ S m ⟧,
     extend_tuple
       (λ i1 : ⟦ S m ⟧,
        inflate
          (extend_tuple (λ i2 : ⟦ m ⟧, inflate (b i2))
             (var (stnweq (inr tt))) i1))
       (var (stnweq (inr tt))) (stnweq (inl i0)))
      (stnweq (inl i)))
⟨ var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inr tt)))),
var (stnweq (inr tt)) ⟩))) =
(λ'm',
(λ'S m',
(a
 • (λ i : ⟦ m ⟧,
    inflate ((λ i0 : ⟦ m ⟧, inflate (b i0)) i))
⟨ var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inr tt)))),
var (stnweq (inr tt)) ⟩)))

  
L: lambda_theory
m, m': ℕ
a: L m
b: ⟦ m ⟧ → L m'
(λ i : ⟦ m ⟧,
 extend_tuple
   (λ i0 : ⟦ S m ⟧,
    inflate
      (extend_tuple (λ i1 : ⟦ m ⟧, inflate (b i1))
         (var (stnweq (inr tt))) i0))
   (var (stnweq (inr tt)))
   (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inl i))))) =
(λ i : ⟦ m ⟧, inflate (inflate (b i)))

  
L: lambda_theory
m, m': ℕ
a: L m
b: ⟦ m ⟧ → L m'
(λ i : ⟦ m ⟧,
 extend_tuple
   (λ i0 : ⟦ S m ⟧,
    inflate
      (extend_tuple (λ i1 : ⟦ m ⟧, inflate (b i1))
         (var (stnweq (inr tt))) i0))
   (var (stnweq (inr tt)))
   (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inl i))))) ~
(λ i : ⟦ m ⟧, inflate (inflate (b i)))

  
L: lambda_theory
m, m': ℕ
a: L m
b: ⟦ m ⟧ → L m'
i: ⟦ m ⟧
extend_tuple
  (λ i : ⟦ S m ⟧,
   inflate
     (extend_tuple (λ i0 : ⟦ m ⟧, inflate (b i0))
        (var (stnweq (inr tt))) i))
  (var (stnweq (inr tt)))
  (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inl i)))) =
inflate (inflate (b i))

  
L: lambda_theory
m, m': ℕ
a: L m
b: ⟦ m ⟧ → L m'
i: ⟦ m ⟧
(λ i : ⟦ S m ⟧,
 inflate
   (extend_tuple (λ i0 : ⟦ m ⟧, inflate (b i0))
      (var (stnweq (inr tt))) i)) (stnweq (inl i)) =
inflate (inflate (b i))

  exact (maponpaths (λ x, (inflate x)) (extend_tuple_inl _ _ _)).
Qed.

Ltac2 Set rewrites as rewrites0 := fun () =>
  ((fun () => match! goal with
  | [ |- (curry ?a) • ?b = _] => refine '(subst_curry _ $a $b)
  end), "subst_curry _ _ _") :: rewrites0 ().

Definition inflate_curry
  (L : lambda_theory)
  {n : nat}
  (a : L n)
  : inflate (curry a) = curry (inflate a)
  := subst_curry _ _ _.

Ltac2 Set rewrites as rewrites0 := fun () =>
  ((fun () => match! goal with
  | [ |- inflate (curry ?a) = _] => refine '(inflate_curry _ $a)
  end), "inflate_curry _ _") :: rewrites0 ().

Lβ: has_β L
m: ℕ
a, b: L m
(curry a b) =
(λ'm,
(inflate a ⟨ inflate b, var (stnweq (inr tt)) ⟩))

  exact (inflate_var _ _).

L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
m: ℕ
a: L (S m)
b: L m
curry b ∘ (λ'm, a) =
(λ'm,
(λ'S m,
(inflate (inflate b)
⟨ inflate a, var (stnweq (inr tt)) ⟩)))

⟨ inflate a, var (stnweq (inr tt)) ⟩)))

b: L m

⟨ (inflate
     (λ'1 + m,
     a
     • extend_tuple
         (λ i : ⟦ m ⟧,

         (var (stnweq (inr tt))))

var (stnweq (inr tt)) ⟩))) =

(inflate (inflate b)
⟨ inflate a, var (stnweq (inr tt)) ⟩)))

⟨ (inflate
     (λ'1 + m,
     a
     • extend_tuple
         (λ i : ⟦ m ⟧,
          var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inl i)))))
         (var (stnweq (inr tt))))
  var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inr tt))))),
var (stnweq (inr tt)) ⟩))) =

(λ'S m,
(inflate (inflate b)
⟨ inflate a, var (stnweq (inr tt)) ⟩)))

  
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
m: ℕ
a: L (S m)
b: L m
(λ'm,
(λ'S m,
(inflate (inflate b)
⟨ ((λ'1 + S m,
   (a
    • extend_tuple
        (λ i : ⟦ m ⟧,
         var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inl i)))))
        (var (stnweq (inr tt))))
   • extend_tuple
       (λ i : ⟦ S m ⟧,
        var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inl i)))))
       (var (stnweq (inr tt))))
  var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inr tt))))),
var (stnweq (inr tt)) ⟩))) =
(λ'm,
(λ'S m,
(inflate (inflate b)
⟨ inflate a, var (stnweq (inr tt)) ⟩)))

(** * 10. Uncurry *)

Definition uncurry
  {L : lambda_theory}
  {m : nat}
  (a : L m)
  : L m
  := abs
    (app
      (app
        (inflate a)
        (app
          π1
          (var (stnweq (inr tt)))))
      (app
          π2
          (var (stnweq (inr tt))))).

Ltac2 Set traversals as traversals0 := fun _ => (
    (fun () => match! goal with | [ |- uncurry _ = _ ] => refine '(maponpaths (λ x, uncurry x) _ @ _) end),
    "uncurry ",
    ""
  ) :: traversals0 ().


L: lambda_theory
m, m': ℕ
a: L m
b: ⟦ m ⟧ → L m'
uncurry a • b = uncurry (a • b)


L: lambda_theory
m, m': ℕ
a: L m
b: ⟦ m ⟧ → L m'
uncurry a • b = uncurry (a • b)

  
L: lambda_theory
m, m': ℕ
a: L m
b: ⟦ m ⟧ → L m'
(λ'm',
((inflate a (π1 var (stnweq (inr tt))))
(π2 var (stnweq (inr tt))))
• extend_tuple (λ i : ⟦ m ⟧, inflate (b i))
    (var (stnweq (inr tt)))) = uncurry (a • b)

(π2 var (stnweq (inr tt)))

    (var (stnweq (inr tt))))) = uncurry (a • b)

L: lambda_theory
m, m': ℕ
a: L m
b: ⟦ m ⟧ → L m'
(λ i : ⟦ m ⟧,
 extend_tuple (λ i0 : ⟦ m ⟧, inflate (b i0))
   (var (stnweq (inr tt))) (stnweq (inl i))) =
(λ i : ⟦ m ⟧, inflate (b i))

  
L: lambda_theory
m, m': ℕ
a: L m
b: ⟦ m ⟧ → L m'
(λ i : ⟦ m ⟧,
 extend_tuple (λ i0 : ⟦ m ⟧, inflate (b i0))
   (var (stnweq (inr tt))) (stnweq (inl i))) ~
(λ i : ⟦ m ⟧, inflate (b i))

  
L: lambda_theory
m, m': ℕ
a: L m
b: ⟦ m ⟧ → L m'
i: ⟦ m ⟧
extend_tuple (λ i : ⟦ m ⟧, inflate (b i))
  (var (stnweq (inr tt))) (stnweq (inl i)) =
inflate (b i)

  exact (extend_tuple_inl _ _ _).
Qed.

Ltac2 Set rewrites as rewrites0 := fun () =>
  ((fun () => match! goal with
  | [ |- (uncurry ?a) • ?b = _] => refine '(subst_uncurry _ $a $b)
  end), "subst_uncurry _ _ _") :: rewrites0 ().

Definition inflate_uncurry
  (L : lambda_theory)
  {n : nat}
  (a : L n)
  : inflate (uncurry a) = uncurry (inflate a)
  := subst_uncurry _ _ _.

Ltac2 Set rewrites as rewrites0 := fun () =>
  ((fun () => match! goal with
  | [ |- inflate (uncurry ?a) = _] => refine '(inflate_uncurry _ $a)
  end), "inflate_uncurry _ _") :: rewrites0 ().


L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
a, b: L n
(uncurry a b) = ((a (π1 b)) (π2 b))

Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
a, b: L n
i: ⟦ n ⟧

Qed.


L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
a, b, c: L n
(uncurry a ⟨ b, c ⟩) = ((a b) c)

Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
a, b, c: L n
(uncurry a ⟨ b, c ⟩) = ((a b) c)

n: ℕ
a, b, c: L n

L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
a, b, c: L n
((a b) (π2 ⟨ b, c ⟩)) = ((a b) c)

  exact (maponpaths (λ x, (app _ x)) (π2_pair _ Lβ _ _)).
Qed.


L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
a, b: L n
uncurry a ∘ b =
(λ'n,
((inflate a (π1 (inflate b var (stnweq (inr tt)))))
(π2 (inflate b var (stnweq (inr tt))))))


L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
a, b: L n
uncurry a ∘ b =
(λ'n,
((inflate a (π1 (inflate b var (stnweq (inr tt)))))
(π2 (inflate b var (stnweq (inr tt))))))

  
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
a, b: L n
(λ'n,
(uncurry (inflate a)
(inflate b var (stnweq (inr tt))))) =
(λ'n,
((inflate a (π1 (inflate b var (stnweq (inr tt)))))
(π2 (inflate b var (stnweq (inr tt))))))

  exact (maponpaths (λ x, (abs x)) (app_uncurry _ Lβ _ _)).
Qed.

(inflate c var (stnweq (inr tt)))))

       var (stnweq (inr tt)) ⟩ (stnweq (inr tt)))
     (stnweq (inl i)))) =
var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inr i''))))

  (λ i : ⟦ S n ⟧,

      • extend_tuple var

                     (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inr tt)))),
                 var (stnweq (inr tt)) ⟩))))
  (var (stnweq (inr tt))) (stnweq (inr i'))
• extend_tuple var
    (π2

      ⟨ var (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inr tt)))),

uncurry (curry a) = a ∘ pair_arrow π1 π2

L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L

a: L n

L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
n: ℕ
a: L n
i: ⟦ n ⟧
extend_tuple var (π2 var (stnweq (inr tt)))
  (stnweq (inl (stnweq (inl i)))) =
var (stnweq (inl i))

  apply extend_tuple_inl.
Qed.

L: lambda_theory
l, m, n: ℕ
a: ⟦ l ⟧ → L m
b: ⟦ m ⟧ → L n
n_tuple a • b = n_tuple (λ i : ⟦ l ⟧, a i • b)


L: lambda_theory
l, m, n: ℕ
a: ⟦ l ⟧ → L m
b: ⟦ m ⟧ → L n
n_tuple a • b = n_tuple (λ i : ⟦ l ⟧, a i • b)

  
L: lambda_theory
m, n: ℕ
a: ⟦ 0 ⟧ → L m
b: ⟦ m ⟧ → L n
n_tuple a • b = n_tuple (λ i : ⟦ 0 ⟧, a i • b)
L: lambda_theory
l, m, n: ℕ
a: ⟦ S l ⟧ → L m
b: ⟦ m ⟧ → L n
IHl: ∏ a : ⟦ l ⟧ → L m, n_tuple a • b = n_tuple (λ i : ⟦ l ⟧, a i • b)
n_tuple a • b = n_tuple (λ i : ⟦ S l ⟧, a i • b)

  
L: lambda_theory
m, n: ℕ
a: ⟦ 0 ⟧ → L m
b: ⟦ m ⟧ → L n
n_tuple a • b = n_tuple (λ i : ⟦ 0 ⟧, a i • b)
 
L: lambda_theory
m, n: ℕ
a: ⟦ 0 ⟧ → L m
b: ⟦ m ⟧ → L n
(λ'n,
var (stnweq (inr tt))
• extend_tuple (λ i : ⟦ m ⟧, inflate (b i))
    (var (stnweq (inr tt)))) =
n_tuple (λ i : ⟦ 0 ⟧, a i • b)

    
L: lambda_theory
m, n: ℕ
a: ⟦ 0 ⟧ → L m
b: ⟦ m ⟧ → L n
(λ'n,
extend_tuple (λ i : ⟦ m ⟧, inflate (b i))
  (var (stnweq (inr tt))) (stnweq (inr tt))) =
n_tuple (λ i : ⟦ 0 ⟧, a i • b)

    
L: lambda_theory
m, n: ℕ
a: ⟦ 0 ⟧ → L m
b: ⟦ m ⟧ → L n
extend_tuple (λ i : ⟦ m ⟧, inflate (b i))
  (var (stnweq (inr tt))) (stnweq (inr tt)) =
var (stnweq (inr tt))

    apply extend_tuple_inr.
  
L: lambda_theory
l, m, n: ℕ
a: ⟦ S l ⟧ → L m
b: ⟦ m ⟧ → L n
IHl: ∏ a : ⟦ l ⟧ → L m, n_tuple a • b = n_tuple (λ i : ⟦ l ⟧, a i • b)
n_tuple a • b = n_tuple (λ i : ⟦ S l ⟧, a i • b)
 
L: lambda_theory
l, m, n: ℕ
a: ⟦ S l ⟧ → L m
b: ⟦ m ⟧ → L n
IHl: ∏ a : ⟦ l ⟧ → L m, n_tuple a • b = n_tuple (λ i : ⟦ l ⟧, a i • b)
⟨ (fix F (n : ℕ) :
       (λ m0 : ℕ, (⟦ m0 ⟧ → L m) → L m) n :=
     match
       n as n0
       return ((λ m0 : ℕ, (⟦ m0 ⟧ → L m) → L m) n0)
     with
     | 0 =>
         λ _ : ⟦ 0 ⟧ → L m,
         (λ'm, var (stnweq (inr tt)))
     | S n0 =>
         (λ (m0 : ℕ) (IHm : (⟦ m0 ⟧ → L m) → L m)
          (a : ⟦ S m0 ⟧ → L m),
          ⟨ IHm
              (λ i : ⟦ m0 ⟧,
               a (let X := pr1 stnweq in X (inl i))),
          a (let X := pr1 stnweq in X (inr tt)) ⟩) n0
           (F n0)
     end) l
    (λ i : ⟦ l ⟧, a (let X := pr1 stnweq in X (inl i)))
  • b, a (let X := pr1 stnweq in X (inr tt)) • b ⟩ =
n_tuple (λ i : ⟦ S l ⟧, a i • b)

    
L: lambda_theory
l, m, n: ℕ
a: ⟦ S l ⟧ → L m
b: ⟦ m ⟧ → L n
IHl: ∏ a : ⟦ l ⟧ → L m, n_tuple a • b = n_tuple (λ i : ⟦ l ⟧, a i • b)
(fix F (n : ℕ) : (⟦ n ⟧ → L m) → L m :=
   match n as n0 return ((⟦ n0 ⟧ → L m) → L m) with
   | 0 =>
       λ _ : ⟦ 0 ⟧ → L m, (λ'm, var (stnweq (inr tt)))
   | S n0 =>
       λ a : ⟦ S n0 ⟧ → L m,
       ⟨ F n0
           (λ i : ⟦ n0 ⟧,
            a (let X := pr1 stnweq in X (inl i))),
       a (let X := pr1 stnweq in X (inr tt)) ⟩
   end) l
  (λ i : ⟦ l ⟧, a (let X := pr1 stnweq in X (inl i)))
• b =
(fix F (n : ℕ) : (⟦ n ⟧ → L n) → L n :=
   match n as n0 return ((⟦ n0 ⟧ → L n) → L n) with
   | 0 =>
       λ _ : ⟦ 0 ⟧ → L n, (λ'n, var (stnweq (inr tt)))
   | S n0 =>
       λ a : ⟦ S n0 ⟧ → L n,
       ⟨ F n0
           (λ i : ⟦ n0 ⟧,
            a (let X := pr1 stnweq in X (inl i))),
       a (let X := pr1 stnweq in X (inr tt)) ⟩
   end) l
  (λ i : ⟦ l ⟧,
   a (let X := pr1 stnweq in X (inl i)) • b)

    apply IHl.
Qed.

Ltac2 Set rewrites as rewrites0 := fun () =>
  ((fun () => match! goal with
  | [ |- n_tuple ?a • ?b = _] => refine '(subst_n_tuple _ $a $b)
  end), "subst_n_tuple _ _ _") :: rewrites0 ().

Definition inflate_n_tuple
  (L : lambda_theory)
  {m n : nat}
  (a : stn m → L n)
  : inflate (n_tuple a) = n_tuple (λ i, inflate (a i))
  := subst_n_tuple _ _ _.

Ltac2 Set rewrites as rewrites0 := fun () =>
  ((fun () => match! goal with
  | [ |- inflate (n_tuple ?a) = _] => refine '(inflate_n_tuple _ $a)
  end), "inflate_n_tuple _ _") :: rewrites0 ().

(** * 12. N-tuple arrow *)

Definition n_tuple_arrow
  {L : lambda_theory}
  {m n : nat}
  (a : stn m → L n)
  : L n
  := abs
    (n_tuple
      (λ i, app
        (inflate (a i))
        (var (stnweq (inr tt))))).


L: lambda_theory
l, m, n: ℕ
a: ⟦ l ⟧ → L m
b: ⟦ m ⟧ → L n
n_tuple_arrow a • b =
n_tuple_arrow (λ i : ⟦ l ⟧, a i • b)


L: lambda_theory
l, m, n: ℕ
a: ⟦ l ⟧ → L m
b: ⟦ m ⟧ → L n
n_tuple_arrow a • b =
n_tuple_arrow (λ i : ⟦ l ⟧, a i • b)

  
L: lambda_theory
l, m, n: ℕ
a: ⟦ l ⟧ → L m
b: ⟦ m ⟧ → L n
(λ'n,
n_tuple
  (λ i : ⟦ l ⟧, (inflate (a i) var (stnweq (inr tt))))
• extend_tuple (λ i : ⟦ m ⟧, inflate (b i))
    (var (stnweq (inr tt)))) =
n_tuple_arrow (λ i : ⟦ l ⟧, a i • b)

  
L: lambda_theory
l, m, n: ℕ
a: ⟦ l ⟧ → L m
b: ⟦ m ⟧ → L n
(λ'n,
n_tuple
  (λ i : ⟦ l ⟧,
   (λ i0 : ⟦ l ⟧,
    (inflate (a i0) var (stnweq (inr tt)))) i
   • extend_tuple (λ i0 : ⟦ m ⟧, inflate (b i0))
       (var (stnweq (inr tt))))) =
n_tuple_arrow (λ i : ⟦ l ⟧, a i • b)

l, m, n: ℕ
a: ⟦ l ⟧ → L m
b: ⟦ m ⟧ → L n
(λ i : ⟦ l ⟧,
 (inflate (a i) var (stnweq (inr tt)))
 • extend_tuple (λ i0 : ⟦ m ⟧, inflate (b i0))
     (var (stnweq (inr tt)))) =
(λ i : ⟦ l ⟧,
 (inflate (a i • b) var (stnweq (inr tt))))

  
L: lambda_theory
l, m, n: ℕ

b: ⟦ m ⟧ → L n
(λ i : ⟦ l ⟧,
 (inflate (a i) var (stnweq (inr tt)))
 • extend_tuple (λ i0 : ⟦ m ⟧, inflate (b i0))
     (var (stnweq (inr tt)))) ~
(λ i : ⟦ l ⟧,
 (inflate (a i • b) var (stnweq (inr tt))))

    (var (stnweq (inr tt))) =
(inflate (a i • b) var (stnweq (inr tt)))

l, m, n: ℕ
a: ⟦ l ⟧ → L m
b: ⟦ m ⟧ → L n

(λ i : ⟦ m ⟧,

   (var (stnweq (inr tt))) (stnweq (inl i))) =

l, m, n: ℕ
a: ⟦ l ⟧ → L m

(λ i : ⟦ m ⟧,
 extend_tuple (λ i0 : ⟦ m ⟧, inflate (b i0))
   (var (stnweq (inr tt))) (stnweq (inl i))) ~
(λ i : ⟦ m ⟧, inflate (b i))

  
L: lambda_theory
l, m, n: ℕ
a: ⟦ l ⟧ → L m
b: ⟦ m ⟧ → L n
i: ⟦ l ⟧
j: ⟦ m ⟧
extend_tuple (λ i : ⟦ m ⟧, inflate (b i))
  (var (stnweq (inr tt))) (stnweq (inl j)) =
inflate (b j)

  exact (extend_tuple_inl _ _ _).
Qed.

Ltac2 Set rewrites as rewrites0 := fun () =>
  ((fun () => match! goal with
  | [ |- n_tuple_arrow ?a • ?b = _] => refine '(subst_n_tuple_arrow _ $a $b)
  end), "subst_n_tuple_arrow _ _ _") :: rewrites0 ().

Definition inflate_n_tuple_arrow
  (L : lambda_theory)
  {m n : nat}
  (a : stn m → L n)
  : inflate (n_tuple_arrow a) = n_tuple_arrow (λ i, inflate (a i))
  := subst_n_tuple_arrow _ _ _.

Ltac2 Set rewrites as rewrites0 := fun () =>
  ((fun () => match! goal with
  | [ |- inflate (n_tuple_arrow ?a) = _] => refine '(inflate_n_tuple_arrow _ $a)
  end), "inflate_n_tuple_arrow _ _") :: rewrites0 ().

b: L n
(n_tuple_arrow a b) = n_tuple (λ i : ⟦ m ⟧, (a i b))

(n_tuple_arrow a b) = n_tuple (λ i : ⟦ S m ⟧, (a i b))

• extend_tuple var b = n_tuple (λ i : ⟦ 0 ⟧, (a i b))

(λ'n,
var (stnweq (inr tt))
• extend_tuple
    (λ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, inflate (extend_tuple var b i))
    (var (stnweq (inr tt)))) =

L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L

b: L n
(λ'n,
extend_tuple
  (λ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, inflate (extend_tuple var b i))
  (var (stnweq (inr tt))) (stnweq (inr tt))) =

    apply extend_tuple_inr.
  
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
m, n: ℕ
a: ⟦ S m ⟧ → L n
b: L n
IHm: ∏ a : ⟦ m ⟧ → L n, (n_tuple_arrow a b) = n_tuple (λ i : ⟦ m ⟧, (a i b))
(n_tuple_arrow a b) = n_tuple (λ i : ⟦ S m ⟧, (a i b))

   (inflate (a i) var (stnweq (inr tt))))

L: lambda_theory

m, n: ℕ
a: ⟦ S m ⟧ → L n

Lβ: has_β L
m, n: ℕ
a: ⟦ S m ⟧ → L n
b: L n
IHm: ∏ a : ⟦ m ⟧ → L n, (n_tuple_arrow a b) = n_tuple (λ i : ⟦ m ⟧, (a i b))
i: ⟦ S m ⟧
j: ⟦ n ⟧
extend_tuple var b (stnweq (inl j)) = var j

    apply extend_tuple_inl.
Qed.


L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
m, n: ℕ
a: ⟦ m ⟧ → L n
b: L n
n_tuple_arrow a ∘ b =
n_tuple_arrow (λ i : ⟦ m ⟧, a i ∘ b)


L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
m, n: ℕ
a: ⟦ m ⟧ → L n
b: L n
n_tuple_arrow a ∘ b =
n_tuple_arrow (λ i : ⟦ m ⟧, a i ∘ b)

  
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
m, n: ℕ
a: ⟦ m ⟧ → L n
b: L n
(λ'n,
(n_tuple_arrow (λ i : ⟦ m ⟧, inflate (a i))
(inflate b var (stnweq (inr tt))))) =
n_tuple_arrow (λ i : ⟦ m ⟧, a i ∘ b)

  
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
m, n: ℕ
a: ⟦ m ⟧ → L n
b: L n
(n_tuple_arrow (λ i : ⟦ m ⟧, inflate (a i))
(inflate b var (stnweq (inr tt)))) =
n_tuple
  (λ i : ⟦ m ⟧,
   (inflate (a i ∘ b) var (stnweq (inr tt))))

  
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
m, n: ℕ
a: ⟦ m ⟧ → L n
b: L n
n_tuple
  (λ i : ⟦ m ⟧,
   ((λ i0 : ⟦ m ⟧, inflate (a i0)) i
   (inflate b var (stnweq (inr tt))))) =
n_tuple
  (λ i : ⟦ m ⟧,
   (inflate (a i ∘ b) var (stnweq (inr tt))))

  
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
m, n: ℕ
a: ⟦ m ⟧ → L n
b: L n
(λ i : ⟦ m ⟧,
 (inflate (a i) (inflate b var (stnweq (inr tt))))) =
(λ i : ⟦ m ⟧,
 (inflate (a i ∘ b) var (stnweq (inr tt))))

  
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
m, n: ℕ
a: ⟦ m ⟧ → L n
b: L n
(λ i : ⟦ m ⟧,
 (inflate (a i) (inflate b var (stnweq (inr tt))))) ~
(λ i : ⟦ m ⟧,
 (inflate (a i ∘ b) var (stnweq (inr tt))))

  
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
m, n: ℕ
a: ⟦ m ⟧ → L n
b: L n
i: ⟦ m ⟧
(inflate (a i) (inflate b var (stnweq (inr tt)))) =
(inflate (a i ∘ b) var (stnweq (inr tt)))

  
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
m, n: ℕ
a: ⟦ m ⟧ → L n
b: L n
i: ⟦ m ⟧
(inflate (a i) (inflate b var (stnweq (inr tt)))) =
(inflate (a i) ∘ inflate b var (stnweq (inr tt)))

  exact (!app_compose _ Lβ _ _ _).
Qed.

L: lambda_theory

n_π i • a = n_π i

l, m, n: ℕ

    apply i.
  
L: lambda_theory
l, m, n: ℕ
i: ⟦ S l ⟧
a: ⟦ m ⟧ → L n
IHl: ∏ i : ⟦ l ⟧, n_π i • a = n_π i
n_π i • a = n_π i
 
L: lambda_theory
l, m, n: ℕ
i: ⟦ S l ⟧
a: ⟦ m ⟧ → L n
IHl: ∏ i : ⟦ l ⟧, n_π i • a = n_π i
coprod_rect (λ _ : ⟦ l ⟧ ⨿ unit, L m)
  (λ i' : ⟦ l ⟧,
   (fix F (n : ℕ) : ⟦ n ⟧ → L m :=
      match n as n0 return (⟦ n0 ⟧ → L m) with
      | 0 => λ i : ⟦ 0 ⟧, fromempty (negstn0 i)
      | S n0 =>
          λ i : ⟦ S n0 ⟧,
          coprod_rect (λ _ : ⟦ n0 ⟧ ⨿ unit, L m)
            (λ i'0 : ⟦ n0 ⟧, F n0 i'0 ∘ π1)
            (λ _ : unit, π2) (invmap stnweq i)
      end) l i' ∘ π1) (λ _ : unit, π2)
  (invmap stnweq i) • a =
coprod_rect (λ _ : ⟦ l ⟧ ⨿ unit, L n)
  (λ i' : ⟦ l ⟧,
   (fix F (n : ℕ) : ⟦ n ⟧ → L n :=
      match n as n0 return (⟦ n0 ⟧ → L n) with
      | 0 => λ i : ⟦ 0 ⟧, fromempty (negstn0 i)
      | S n0 =>
          λ i : ⟦ S n0 ⟧,
          coprod_rect (λ _ : ⟦ n0 ⟧ ⨿ unit, L n)
            (λ i'0 : ⟦ n0 ⟧, F n0 i'0 ∘ π1)
            (λ _ : unit, π2) (invmap stnweq i)
      end) l i' ∘ π1) (λ _ : unit, π2)
  (invmap stnweq i)

    
L: lambda_theory
l, m, n: ℕ
i: ⟦ S l ⟧
a: ⟦ m ⟧ → L n
IHl: ∏ i : ⟦ l ⟧, n_π i • a = n_π i
i': ⟦ l ⟧
coprod_rect (λ _ : ⟦ l ⟧ ⨿ unit, L m)
  (λ i' : ⟦ l ⟧,
   (fix F (n : ℕ) : ⟦ n ⟧ → L m :=
      match n as n0 return (⟦ n0 ⟧ → L m) with
      | 0 => λ i : ⟦ 0 ⟧, fromempty (negstn0 i)
      | S n0 =>
          λ i : ⟦ S n0 ⟧,
          coprod_rect (λ _ : ⟦ n0 ⟧ ⨿ unit, L m)
            (λ i'0 : ⟦ n0 ⟧, F n0 i'0 ∘ π1)
            (λ _ : unit, π2) (invmap stnweq i)
      end) l i' ∘ π1) (λ _ : unit, π2) (inl i') • a =
coprod_rect (λ _ : ⟦ l ⟧ ⨿ unit, L n)
  (λ i' : ⟦ l ⟧,
   (fix F (n : ℕ) : ⟦ n ⟧ → L n :=
      match n as n0 return (⟦ n0 ⟧ → L n) with
      | 0 => λ i : ⟦ 0 ⟧, fromempty (negstn0 i)
      | S n0 =>
          λ i : ⟦ S n0 ⟧,
          coprod_rect (λ _ : ⟦ n0 ⟧ ⨿ unit, L n)
            (λ i'0 : ⟦ n0 ⟧, F n0 i'0 ∘ π1)
            (λ _ : unit, π2) (invmap stnweq i)
      end) l i' ∘ π1) (λ _ : unit, π2) (inl i')
L: lambda_theory
l, m, n: ℕ
i: ⟦ S l ⟧
a: ⟦ m ⟧ → L n
IHl: ∏ i : ⟦ l ⟧, n_π i • a = n_π i
i': unit
coprod_rect (λ _ : ⟦ l ⟧ ⨿ unit, L m)
  (λ i' : ⟦ l ⟧,
   (fix F (n : ℕ) : ⟦ n ⟧ → L m :=
      match n as n0 return (⟦ n0 ⟧ → L m) with
      | 0 => λ i : ⟦ 0 ⟧, fromempty (negstn0 i)
      | S n0 =>
          λ i : ⟦ S n0 ⟧,

            (λ i'0 : ⟦ n0 ⟧, F n0 i'0 ∘ π1)

      end) l i' ∘ π1) (λ _ : unit, π2) (inr i') • a =
coprod_rect (λ _ : ⟦ l ⟧ ⨿ unit, L n)
  (λ i' : ⟦ l ⟧,
   (fix F (n : ℕ) : ⟦ n ⟧ → L n :=
      match n as n0 return (⟦ n0 ⟧ → L n) with
      | 0 => λ i : ⟦ 0 ⟧, fromempty (negstn0 i)
      | S n0 =>
          λ i : ⟦ S n0 ⟧,
          coprod_rect (λ _ : ⟦ n0 ⟧ ⨿ unit, L n)
            (λ i'0 : ⟦ n0 ⟧, F n0 i'0 ∘ π1)
            (λ _ : unit, π2) (invmap stnweq i)
      end) l i' ∘ π1) (λ _ : unit, π2) (inr i')

  (λ i' : ⟦ l ⟧,

      | S n0 =>

L: lambda_theory
l, m, n: ℕ
i: ⟦ S l ⟧
a: ⟦ m ⟧ → L n
IHl: ∏ i : ⟦ l ⟧, n_π i • a = n_π i
i': ⟦ l ⟧
(fix F (n : ℕ) : ⟦ n ⟧ → L m :=
   match n as n0 return (⟦ n0 ⟧ → L m) with
   | 0 => λ i : ⟦ 0 ⟧, fromempty (negstn0 i)
   | S n0 =>
       λ i : ⟦ S n0 ⟧,
       coprod_rect (λ _ : ⟦ n0 ⟧ ⨿ unit, L m)
         (λ i' : ⟦ n0 ⟧, F n0 i' ∘ π1)
         (λ _ : unit, π2) (invmap stnweq i)
   end) l i' • a ∘ π1 • a =
coprod_rect (λ _ : ⟦ l ⟧ ⨿ unit, L n)
  (λ i' : ⟦ l ⟧,
   (fix F (n : ℕ) : ⟦ n ⟧ → L n :=
      match n as n0 return (⟦ n0 ⟧ → L n) with
      | 0 => λ i : ⟦ 0 ⟧, fromempty (negstn0 i)
      | S n0 =>
          λ i : ⟦ S n0 ⟧,
          coprod_rect (λ _ : ⟦ n0 ⟧ ⨿ unit, L n)
            (λ i'0 : ⟦ n0 ⟧, F n0 i'0 ∘ π1)
            (λ _ : unit, π2) (invmap stnweq i)
      end) l i' ∘ π1) (λ _ : unit, π2) (inl i')

      
L: lambda_theory
l, m, n: ℕ
i: ⟦ S l ⟧
a: ⟦ m ⟧ → L n
IHl: ∏ i : ⟦ l ⟧, n_π i • a = n_π i
i': ⟦ l ⟧
(fix F (n : ℕ) : ⟦ n ⟧ → L m :=
   match n as n0 return (⟦ n0 ⟧ → L m) with
   | 0 => λ i : ⟦ 0 ⟧, fromempty (negstn0 i)
   | S n0 =>
       λ i : ⟦ S n0 ⟧,
       coprod_rect (λ _ : ⟦ n0 ⟧ ⨿ unit, L m)
         (λ i' : ⟦ n0 ⟧, F n0 i' ∘ π1)
         (λ _ : unit, π2) (invmap stnweq i)
   end) l i' • a ∘ π1 =
coprod_rect (λ _ : ⟦ l ⟧ ⨿ unit, L n)
  (λ i' : ⟦ l ⟧,
   (fix F (n : ℕ) : ⟦ n ⟧ → L n :=
      match n as n0 return (⟦ n0 ⟧ → L n) with
      | 0 => λ i : ⟦ 0 ⟧, fromempty (negstn0 i)
      | S n0 =>
          λ i : ⟦ S n0 ⟧,
          coprod_rect (λ _ : ⟦ n0 ⟧ ⨿ unit, L n)
            (λ i'0 : ⟦ n0 ⟧, F n0 i'0 ∘ π1)
            (λ _ : unit, π2) (invmap stnweq i)
      end) l i' ∘ π1) (λ _ : unit, π2) (inl i')

      
L: lambda_theory
l, m, n: ℕ
i: ⟦ S l ⟧
a: ⟦ m ⟧ → L n
IHl: ∏ i : ⟦ l ⟧, n_π i • a = n_π i
i': ⟦ l ⟧
(fix F (n : ℕ) : ⟦ n ⟧ → L m :=
   match n as n0 return (⟦ n0 ⟧ → L m) with
   | 0 => λ i : ⟦ 0 ⟧, fromempty (negstn0 i)
   | S n0 =>
       λ i : ⟦ S n0 ⟧,
       coprod_rect (λ _ : ⟦ n0 ⟧ ⨿ unit, L m)
         (λ i' : ⟦ n0 ⟧, F n0 i' ∘ π1)
         (λ _ : unit, π2) (invmap stnweq i)
   end) l i' • a =
(fix F (n : ℕ) : ⟦ n ⟧ → L n :=
   match n as n0 return (⟦ n0 ⟧ → L n) with
   | 0 => λ i : ⟦ 0 ⟧, fromempty (negstn0 i)
   | S n0 =>
       λ i : ⟦ S n0 ⟧,
       coprod_rect (λ _ : ⟦ n0 ⟧ ⨿ unit, L n)
         (λ i' : ⟦ n0 ⟧, F n0 i' ∘ π1)
         (λ _ : unit, π2) (invmap stnweq i)
   end) l i'

      apply IHl.
    
L: lambda_theory
l, m, n: ℕ
i: ⟦ S l ⟧
a: ⟦ m ⟧ → L n
IHl: ∏ i : ⟦ l ⟧, n_π i • a = n_π i
i': unit
coprod_rect (λ _ : ⟦ l ⟧ ⨿ unit, L m)
  (λ i' : ⟦ l ⟧,
   (fix F (n : ℕ) : ⟦ n ⟧ → L m :=
      match n as n0 return (⟦ n0 ⟧ → L m) with
      | 0 => λ i : ⟦ 0 ⟧, fromempty (negstn0 i)
      | S n0 =>
          λ i : ⟦ S n0 ⟧,
          coprod_rect (λ _ : ⟦ n0 ⟧ ⨿ unit, L m)
            (λ i'0 : ⟦ n0 ⟧, F n0 i'0 ∘ π1)
            (λ _ : unit, π2) (invmap stnweq i)
      end) l i' ∘ π1) (λ _ : unit, π2) (inr i') • a =
coprod_rect (λ _ : ⟦ l ⟧ ⨿ unit, L n)
  (λ i' : ⟦ l ⟧,
   (fix F (n : ℕ) : ⟦ n ⟧ → L n :=
      match n as n0 return (⟦ n0 ⟧ → L n) with
      | 0 => λ i : ⟦ 0 ⟧, fromempty (negstn0 i)
      | S n0 =>
          λ i : ⟦ S n0 ⟧,
          coprod_rect (λ _ : ⟦ n0 ⟧ ⨿ unit, L n)
            (λ i'0 : ⟦ n0 ⟧, F n0 i'0 ∘ π1)
            (λ _ : unit, π2) (invmap stnweq i)
      end) l i' ∘ π1) (λ _ : unit, π2) (inr i')
 apply subst_π2.
Qed.

Ltac2 Set rewrites as rewrites0 := fun () =>
  ((fun () => match! goal with
  | [ |- n_π ?a • ?b = _] => refine '(subst_n_π _ $a $b)
  end), "subst_n_π _ _ _") :: rewrites0 ().

Definition inflate_n_π
  (L : lambda_theory)
  {m n : nat}
  (i : stn m)
  : inflate (n_π i) = n_π i
  := subst_n_π L (m := n) _ _.

Ltac2 Set rewrites as rewrites0 := fun () =>
  ((fun () => match! goal with
  | [ |- inflate (n_π ?a) = _] => refine '(inflate_n_π _ $a)
  end), "inflate_n_π _ _") :: rewrites0 ().


L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
m, n: ℕ
i: ⟦ n ⟧
a: ⟦ n ⟧ → L m
(n_π i n_tuple a) = a i

a: ⟦ S n ⟧ → L m
IHn: ∏ (i : ⟦ n ⟧) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → L m), (n_π i n_tuple a) = a i
(n_π i n_tuple a) = a i

L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
m, n: ℕ
i: ⟦ S n ⟧
a: ⟦ S n ⟧ → L m
IHn: ∏ (i : ⟦ n ⟧) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → L m), (n_π i n_tuple a) = a i
(n_π i n_tuple a) = a i
 
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
m, n: ℕ
i: ⟦ S n ⟧
a: ⟦ S n ⟧ → L m
IHn: ∏ (i : ⟦ n ⟧) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → L m), (n_π i n_tuple a) = a i
(n_π i n_tuple a) = a (stnweq (invmap stnweq i))

    
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
m, n: ℕ
i: ⟦ S n ⟧
a: ⟦ S n ⟧ → L m
IHn: ∏ (i : ⟦ n ⟧) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → L m), (n_π i n_tuple a) = a i
(coprod_rect (λ _ : ⟦ n ⟧ ⨿ unit, L m)
   (λ i' : ⟦ n ⟧,
    (fix F (n : ℕ) : ⟦ n ⟧ → L m :=
       match n as n0 return (⟦ n0 ⟧ → L m) with
       | 0 => λ i : ⟦ 0 ⟧, fromempty (negstn0 i)
       | S n0 =>
           λ i : ⟦ S n0 ⟧,
           coprod_rect (λ _ : ⟦ n0 ⟧ ⨿ unit, L m)
             (λ i'0 : ⟦ n0 ⟧, F n0 i'0 ∘ π1)
             (λ _ : unit, π2) (invmap stnweq i)
       end) n i' ∘ π1) (λ _ : unit, π2)
   (invmap stnweq i) n_tuple a) =
a (stnweq (invmap stnweq i))

    
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
m, n: ℕ
i: ⟦ S n ⟧
a: ⟦ S n ⟧ → L m
IHn: ∏ (i : ⟦ n ⟧) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → L m), (n_π i n_tuple a) = a i
i': ⟦ n ⟧
(coprod_rect (λ _ : ⟦ n ⟧ ⨿ unit, L m)
   (λ i' : ⟦ n ⟧,
    (fix F (n : ℕ) : ⟦ n ⟧ → L m :=
       match n as n0 return (⟦ n0 ⟧ → L m) with
       | 0 => λ i : ⟦ 0 ⟧, fromempty (negstn0 i)
       | S n0 =>
           λ i : ⟦ S n0 ⟧,
           coprod_rect (λ _ : ⟦ n0 ⟧ ⨿ unit, L m)
             (λ i'0 : ⟦ n0 ⟧, F n0 i'0 ∘ π1)
             (λ _ : unit, π2) (invmap stnweq i)
       end) n i' ∘ π1) (λ _ : unit, π2) (inl i')
n_tuple a) = a (stnweq (inl i'))
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
m, n: ℕ
i: ⟦ S n ⟧
a: ⟦ S n ⟧ → L m
IHn: ∏ (i : ⟦ n ⟧) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → L m), (n_π i n_tuple a) = a i
i': unit
(coprod_rect (λ _ : ⟦ n ⟧ ⨿ unit, L m)
   (λ i' : ⟦ n ⟧,
    (fix F (n : ℕ) : ⟦ n ⟧ → L m :=
       match n as n0 return (⟦ n0 ⟧ → L m) with
       | 0 => λ i : ⟦ 0 ⟧, fromempty (negstn0 i)
       | S n0 =>
           λ i : ⟦ S n0 ⟧,
           coprod_rect (λ _ : ⟦ n0 ⟧ ⨿ unit, L m)
             (λ i'0 : ⟦ n0 ⟧, F n0 i'0 ∘ π1)
             (λ _ : unit, π2) (invmap stnweq i)
       end) n i' ∘ π1) (λ _ : unit, π2) (inr i')
n_tuple a) = a (stnweq (inr i'))

    
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
m, n: ℕ
i: ⟦ S n ⟧
a: ⟦ S n ⟧ → L m
IHn: ∏ (i : ⟦ n ⟧) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → L m), (n_π i n_tuple a) = a i
i': ⟦ n ⟧
(coprod_rect (λ _ : ⟦ n ⟧ ⨿ unit, L m)
   (λ i' : ⟦ n ⟧,
    (fix F (n : ℕ) : ⟦ n ⟧ → L m :=
       match n as n0 return (⟦ n0 ⟧ → L m) with
       | 0 => λ i : ⟦ 0 ⟧, fromempty (negstn0 i)
       | S n0 =>
           λ i : ⟦ S n0 ⟧,
           coprod_rect (λ _ : ⟦ n0 ⟧ ⨿ unit, L m)
             (λ i'0 : ⟦ n0 ⟧, F n0 i'0 ∘ π1)
             (λ _ : unit, π2) (invmap stnweq i)
       end) n i' ∘ π1) (λ _ : unit, π2) (inl i')
n_tuple a) = a (stnweq (inl i'))
 
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
m, n: ℕ
i: ⟦ S n ⟧
a: ⟦ S n ⟧ → L m
IHn: ∏ (i : ⟦ n ⟧) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → L m), (n_π i n_tuple a) = a i
i': ⟦ n ⟧
((fix F (n : ℕ) : ⟦ n ⟧ → L m :=
    match n as n0 return (⟦ n0 ⟧ → L m) with
    | 0 => λ i : ⟦ 0 ⟧, fromempty (negstn0 i)
    | S n0 =>
        λ i : ⟦ S n0 ⟧,
        coprod_rect (λ _ : ⟦ n0 ⟧ ⨿ unit, L m)
          (λ i' : ⟦ n0 ⟧, F n0 i' ∘ π1)
          (λ _ : unit, π2) (invmap stnweq i)
    end) n i' (π1 n_tuple a)) = a (stnweq (inl i'))

      
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
m, n: ℕ
i: ⟦ S n ⟧
a: ⟦ S n ⟧ → L m
IHn: ∏ (i : ⟦ n ⟧) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → L m), (n_π i n_tuple a) = a i
i': ⟦ n ⟧
((fix F (n : ℕ) : ⟦ n ⟧ → L m :=
    match n as n0 return (⟦ n0 ⟧ → L m) with
    | 0 => λ i : ⟦ 0 ⟧, fromempty (negstn0 i)
    | S n0 =>
        λ i : ⟦ S n0 ⟧,
        coprod_rect (λ _ : ⟦ n0 ⟧ ⨿ unit, L m)
          (λ i' : ⟦ n0 ⟧, F n0 i' ∘ π1)
          (λ _ : unit, π2) (invmap stnweq i)
    end) n i'
(fix F (n : ℕ) : (λ m0 : ℕ, (⟦ m0 ⟧ → L m) → L m) n :=
   match
     n as n0
     return ((λ m0 : ℕ, (⟦ m0 ⟧ → L m) → L m) n0)
   with
   | 0 =>
       λ _ : ⟦ 0 ⟧ → L m, (λ'm, var (stnweq (inr tt)))
   | S n0 =>
       (λ (m0 : ℕ) (IHm : (⟦ m0 ⟧ → L m) → L m)
        (a : ⟦ S m0 ⟧ → L m),
        ⟨ IHm
            (λ i : ⟦ m0 ⟧,
             a (let X := pr1 stnweq in X (inl i))),
        a (let X := pr1 stnweq in X (inr tt)) ⟩) n0
         (F n0)
   end) n
  (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, a (let X := pr1 stnweq in X (inl i)))) =
a (stnweq (inl i'))

      apply IHn.
    
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
m, n: ℕ
i: ⟦ S n ⟧
a: ⟦ S n ⟧ → L m
IHn: ∏ (i : ⟦ n ⟧) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → L m), (n_π i n_tuple a) = a i
i': unit
(coprod_rect (λ _ : ⟦ n ⟧ ⨿ unit, L m)
   (λ i' : ⟦ n ⟧,
    (fix F (n : ℕ) : ⟦ n ⟧ → L m :=
       match n as n0 return (⟦ n0 ⟧ → L m) with
       | 0 => λ i : ⟦ 0 ⟧, fromempty (negstn0 i)
       | S n0 =>
           λ i : ⟦ S n0 ⟧,
           coprod_rect (λ _ : ⟦ n0 ⟧ ⨿ unit, L m)
             (λ i'0 : ⟦ n0 ⟧, F n0 i'0 ∘ π1)
             (λ _ : unit, π2) (invmap stnweq i)
       end) n i' ∘ π1) (λ _ : unit, π2) (inr i')
n_tuple a) = a (stnweq (inr i'))
 
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
m, n: ℕ
i: ⟦ S n ⟧
a: ⟦ S n ⟧ → L m
IHn: ∏ (i : ⟦ n ⟧) (a : ⟦ n ⟧ → L m), (n_π i n_tuple a) = a i
i': unit
has_β L

      exact Lβ.
Qed.

Ltac2 Set rewrites as rewrites0 := fun () =>
  ((fun () => match! goal with
  | [ |- app (n_π ?a) (n_tuple ?b) = _] => refine '(n_π_tuple _ _ $a $b); assumption
  end), "n_π_tuple _ Lβ _ _") :: rewrites0 ().


L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
m, n: ℕ
i: ⟦ m ⟧
a: ⟦ m ⟧ → L n
n_π i ∘ n_tuple_arrow a =
(λ'n, (inflate (a i) var (stnweq (inr tt))))


L: lambda_theory

m, n: ℕ
i: ⟦ m ⟧
a: ⟦ m ⟧ → L n
n_π i ∘ n_tuple_arrow a =
(λ'n, (inflate (a i) var (stnweq (inr tt))))

Lβ: has_β L
m, n: ℕ
i: ⟦ m ⟧
a: ⟦ m ⟧ → L n
(λ'n,
(inflate (n_π i)
n_tuple
  (λ i : ⟦ m ⟧, (inflate (a i) var (stnweq (inr tt)))))) =
(λ'n, (inflate (a i) var (stnweq (inr tt))))

Lβ: has_β L
m, n: ℕ
i: ⟦ m ⟧
a: ⟦ m ⟧ → L n
(λ'n,
(n_π i
n_tuple
  (λ i : ⟦ m ⟧, (inflate (a i) var (stnweq (inr tt)))))) =

L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
m, n: ℕ
i: ⟦ m ⟧
a: ⟦ m ⟧ → L n
(n_π i
n_tuple
  (λ i : ⟦ m ⟧, (inflate (a i) var (stnweq (inr tt))))) =
(inflate (a i) var (stnweq (inr tt)))

  
L: lambda_theory
Lβ: has_β L
m, n: ℕ
i: ⟦ m ⟧
a: ⟦ m ⟧ → L n
has_β L

  exact Lβ.
Qed.
